createImage.promptHint: No image connected → pure text-to-image generation.
createImage.promptHint1: Describe how to edit the source image (wired to the Image port).
createImage.promptHintN: Image 1 = base; describe how to apply images 2…{n}.

tryon.productCountHint: 2 images = add back / side angles to match when the person turns.
tryon.promptPlaceholder: e.g. keep the face and body pose intact, studio lighting, clean background

compose.promptPlaceholder: e.g. composite the person into the template image, keep the face and scene natural, consistent lighting
compose.promptHint: Image 1 = template image (background), Image 2… = subjects to composite in.

input.fieldHint: Takes the value from the input passed in when the workflow runs.

output.descMarkdown: Chat renders markdown (tables, code, lists). Default — fits most cases.
output.descText: Plain monospace text, no formatting. For raw output from LLM/HTTP.
output.descJson: Parse text → JSON object in metadata.parsed. Chat renders syntax highlight + UI to inspect.
output.descVideo: Render an inline MP4 player (output.video URL). For Motion / Fashion Motion.
output.descImage: Render an image preview (output.image URL). For image generation nodes.
output.descFile: Return a downloadable file to the user (if the previous node has .file).

motionTransfer.promptPlaceholder: e.g. model turns gently, hair flowing in the wind, slow camera pan, cinematic lighting
motionTransfer.promptHint: The video provider (e.g. Veo) generates video from the input image plus this description.

ss.promptPlaceholder: e.g. gentle camera pan around the product, cinematic lighting, smooth moving background
ss.promptHint: The video provider generates a clip from the input image(s) plus this description.

wanI2v.promptPlaceholder: e.g. smooth transition from first image to last image, slow camera pan
wanI2v.promptHint: Connect the First image (required) and Last image (optional) to the left ports.

textToVideo.promptPlaceholder: e.g. a cinematic drone clip of an industrial park at dawn, golden light
textToVideo.promptHint: Generate video directly from the description (no image needed).

fashionMotion.promptPlaceholder: E.g.: model walking in the product, camera pan, fashion lighting

bds.promptPlaceholder: E.g.: from empty lot → foundation → floors → finished house, time-lapse, drone shot
bds.promptHint: Generate a time-lapse video from the input image + stage description.

teaser.promptPlaceholder: E.g.: cinematic ad teaser for the product, luxurious staging, smooth camera pans

concat.title: Merge scenes
concat.intro: Join {scenes} (video clips) into one video, {audio} (each scene keeps its own voice). Each {port} port connects to a video node (Talk/Motion/Teaser). Clips are normalized to the same frame size then joined sequentially.
concat.clipCountHint: Number of input ports (Scene 1…N). Connect each port to a clip; clips are merged in port order.
concat.fpsHint: Normalize every clip to this fps when merging. Default 25.
concat.musicVolumeHint: 0.3–0.4 if there IS narration (music underneath) · 0.8–1.0 if NO voice (music as main background).

talk.linePlaceholder: Enter the line the character will speak…

voiceover.scriptPlaceholder: Enter the narration for the video…

subtitle.targetLangHint: Transcribe speech from video/audio then translate via a Text-group provider.

editor.buildBdsPipelineTooltip: Build Real-estate Time-lapse pipeline (auto-generate nodes by stage count)
editor.newSessionTooltip: Open a new editing session (enter a new prompt) — runs nothing
editor.runWorkflowTooltip: Run workflow (creates a new run — run as many in parallel as you like)
editor.editorTabTooltip: Editor page (canvas) — edit prompt/node then press Run workflow
editor.runTabRunning: Run in progress — click to follow
editor.canvasEmptyHint: Drag a node from the left panel to start
editor.resumeTooltip: Resume from the error: reuse finished steps, only re-render the failed node and onward
editor.rerunTooltip: Re-run from scratch with this input (re-render everything)
editor.jobCancelledHint: Worker stopped, GPU freed. You can re-run the workflow if needed.
editor.expandFull: Show full (may be slow with large files)
editor.outputTruncated: …({n} more chars — click the expand icon or download the .txt)
editor.pressRunHintPost: in the top bar to run the workflow
editor.nodeNoConfig: This node has no config — it only defines flow.
editor.onErrorStopHint: On error → workflow stops with status "error".
editor.onErrorContinueHint: On error → log a warning, pass the previous output node downstream (as if this node didn't run).
editor.onErrorRouteHintPre: On error → fire through the handle
editor.onErrorRouteHintPost: (orange) on the right. Wire it to an error-handling node (HTTP notify, fallback chat...).
editor.syncApiSub: POST /invoke — waits for a response containing the output. Use for fast workflows (under 30s).
editor.asyncToggleHintC: immediately → App AI calls the callback when done.
editor.callbackUrlHintPre: Endpoint App B receives the POST when the workflow finishes. Must start with
editor.headersHintPost: — App AI forwards them verbatim with the callback, App B verifies via its existing middleware.
editor.webhookHeadersHintPost: + the custom headers above. Auto-retries 3 times (30s/2m/10m) if App B returns non-2xx.
editor.testInputHintPost: . Other fields (image/file) aren't supported via the modal yet — use a URL/Upload source.
editor.bdsIntroT1: → fans out into the number of stages you choose, each stage a chain of
editor.bdsIntroT3: . Upload just 1 image at run time. Edit each node's prompt/voice after building.
editor.bdsVoiceoverHint: Each stage adds a node reading the description over the clip (Vietnamese voice).
editor.bdsNightSceneHint: Add a final scene: the finished house at night, warm lights + night flycam.
editor.hintInputImage: Image — upload from device or URL
editor.hintInputVideo: Video — upload from device or URL
editor.hintOutput: Return the result to the end user
editor.hintCreateImage: Description → AI image. Can attach 1–3 reference images. (Create/edit image provider group)
editor.hintTryon: Model + product → outfit-swapped image. (Create/edit image provider group)
editor.hintCompose: Composite a real person into a template image, keeping the face. (Create/edit image provider group)
editor.hintMotion: Image + motion description → video. (Create video provider group)
editor.hintFashionMotion: Model + product → fashion video. (Create video provider group)
editor.hintSs: Image → video. Inputs 1–3 images (adjust in the Inspector). (Create video provider group)
editor.hintWanI2v: Attach a first image (+ optional last image) + description → video. (Create video provider group)
editor.hintTextToVideo: Description → short video, no image needed. (Create video provider group)
editor.hintBds: 1 image → house-building time-lapse video (ground→foundation→frame→finished) + flycam. (Create video provider group)
editor.hintTalk: Character image + dialogue line → lip-synced talking video. (Voice provider group)
editor.hintVoiceover: Video clip + narration → voice dubbed over the clip, keeping the visuals and duration. (Voice provider group)
editor.hintTeaser: Product + script → cinematic ad video. (Create video provider group)
editor.hintConcat: Concatenate 2+ scenes (video clips) into one video, KEEPING each scene's audio. Wire ports clip1, clip2… from talk/motion nodes.
editor.hintSubtitle: 1 video → transcribe dialogue + translate subtitles. (Recognition/subtitle provider group)
editor.hintValidate: Check fields + math after the LLM
editor.fmWaitingWorker: Fashion Motion · waiting for a worker…
editor.rerunConfirmMsg: This creates a new run with the same input. Heavy job (~6-22 min GPU).
editor.resumeConfirmMsg: Reuse the already-rendered steps (old images/clips), only re-render the failed node and onward. Much faster than a fresh run.
editor.cancelJobConfirmMsg: The worker will stop and delete the job. This cannot be undone.
editor.bdsRebuildMsg: The canvas already has an auto-generated real-estate pipeline. Rebuilding will DELETE the old auto-generated nodes (including edited prompts) and create new ones.
editor.toastStaticLegacy: {n} legacy static file(s) have no staticUrl — re-upload to persist across reload.
editor.toastNewSession: New editing session — edit the prompt then press "Run workflow" to run.
editor.toastLibraryInputMissing: Input {names} uses a Library source but no file is selected. Open the inspector and pick again before running.
editor.runConfirmHeavyMsg: The workflow has a Fashion Motion / Motion Transfer node — a heavy job (~6-22 min GPU). Confirm run?
editor.fmStageSending: Sending the request to the provider…
editor.toastStaticTooBig: Total static files {mb}MB exceed 25MB. Upload via /storage → switch node source = Library to run the workflow.
editor.errKickTimeout: Kick test timeout — check the server.
editor.toastCallbackUrlScheme: Callback URL must start with http:// or https://
editor.deleteRunMsg: Permanently delete run {time} ({status}). Cannot be recovered.
editor.clearHistoryMsg: This permanently deletes {n} finished run(s) of this workflow. Running jobs are kept.

home.title: Workflow Pipeline
home.emptyHint: Create your first workflow to start the pipeline.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.subtitleProvider: Attach AI providers by capability group. API keys are encrypted securely in your browser.
settingsPage.subtitleData: Store workflows in localStorage or Neon; files in Supabase (if configured) or localStorage.

provider.vaultUnsupported: Your browser does not support Web Crypto/IndexedDB — API keys will NOT be encrypted. Please use a modern browser.
provider.emptyState: Click a preset above to add a provider (base URL + model prefilled), then paste your API key.
provider.name: Name
provider.keyKeepPlaceholder: •••• (keep current key — leave blank to keep)

data.neonHelp: Paste your Neon Postgres URL (SQL-over-HTTP from the browser) then click Sync to create tables and push local data up. Leave blank = localStorage.
data.fileStoreHelp: With Supabase, images/videos/audio upload to Storage (durable, shareable URLs). Leave blank to keep them in IndexedDB on this machine. The key is encrypted
data.emptyFiles: No files yet. Images/videos created by the workflow (while Supabase is off) are stored here.
data.footerNote: Everything lives in this browser on this machine (FE-only). Clearing the browser cache loses local files. API keys and the Supabase key are encrypted; the Postgres URL (which contains the password) is not.
data.msgSynced: Created tables and pushed {n} records. Now using Neon.
data.fsMsgSaved: Saved — new files will go to Supabase.
data.fsMsgCleared: Supabase turned off — back to IndexedDB.

monitor.title: Running jobs
monitor.emptyHint: Open a workflow and click Test to begin.

providerBadge.subBind: Tap to link a provider to this node
providerBadge.modelHint: (pick from the list or type your own)

debug.emptyResult: No result yet — run the workflow to see it
debug.emptyLog: Empty — the log fills in after a run

upload.clickOrDrag: Click or drag a file here
